parameters: Hey... do you know that first-year student who joined the student council this year？
Ah！ I know, I know！ She's super cute！
We've got our eyes on her~ (laughs)
Well？ She's on the student council, so isn't she a proper lady？
Whoa~！ When girls like that take off their clothes, it's pretty intense... for me.
Ah, but！ When I passed by her the other day,
she was carrying a book on programming with her textbooks, right?
Ah, it seems like she might be into that sort of thing, despite appearances~！

I got a message on my phone.
Ah, good job, \N[0001]-kun. Were you okay yesterday？
Yes！ After that, I apologized to Takashi, and everything's back to normal.
Is that so? I was a bit worried about it...
Because even when I asked Takashi-kun yesterday, he wouldn't tell me...
Takashi-kun seems to have a bit of a childish side...
So, that's why I called Takashi-kun here too.
No, thanks for the mail yesterday.
W-what's wrong... you were your usual self this morning...
N-no... it's just that you apologized, so I thought it was fine...！
B-but Ayabe-senpai said I should apologize properly...
S-sorry... I got too caught up with having a girlfriend and...
I-I understand how you feel... you must have been happy to have a girlfriend, right？
So, we've both apologized, so we're good, right？
I-if you're willing to forgive me...
We're best friends, aren't we? I won't forgive you? No way... I'll even support you.
It's true what they say, having good friends and a girlfriend is the best！
Yes, yes, so I should get a girlfriend too, huh～
If there's anything I can do to help, I'll do it！
So, when that time comes, I'll count on you.
...looks like you two made up okay.
Is that so... well, I'm glad to hear that.
Maho-senpai is really serious in situations like this... as expected, I guess...
Takashi-kun... at school, you don't usually call me that...
Ah, I-I'm sorry... it just slipped out...
What's going on, what's going on... suddenly you're being so couple-like...
！！ N-not at all... you two are...
A-anyway, now that you've made up, how about trying out kyudo today？
Now that I think about it, there is no one today... club members.
Ah, the archery club is on break today.
So, I thought it was just right.
Archery makes you feel refreshed and calm...
I think even a novice can enjoy it.
W-well... I guess I'll give it a try...
Well, I'll teach you various things, so come over here...
The three of us enjoyed archery until we felt refreshed.
\N[0001]You still look like you can keep going, don't you？
No... I'm exhausted... You both are amazing, aren't you...！？
I had a lot of fun with archery, so I didn't think much about my stamina...
\N[0001]You have a talent for archery, don't you?
No way！ It's not like I'm talented or anything...
No, I'm having a lot of fun... Look, check out the target？
Ehh... Seriously... It's pretty close to the center...
If you train, you might be able to get pretty far, right？
I'd even want you on our team.
I won't be able to join the archery club...！ Ah, thank you very much...！
A-Ayabe-senpai, aren't you getting thirsty？ Takashi too.
Now that you mention it... I've sweated this much...
As a thank you for today, I'll go buy some drinks.
It's fine！ Well, I'll go get that, so just wait here！
Alright, I'll buy some drinks from the vending machine.
After buying drinks, I should probably go to the nurse's office too.
※Investigating specific locations will progress the event.
Ah, um...！ I-I wonder if it's okay...
Well... um... this is such a place... it's dirty... \N[0001]senpai...
And also... the smell and all...
It's not like that at all...！
Ayame-chan's armpit is soft and feels great...
I heard you weren't feeling well today, so...
I thought maybe here I could enjoy it...♪
I-I'm so embarrassed... this is my first time doing something like this...
Is that so... for me, Ayame-chan, whether it's your feet or armpits or anywhere else,
I'll be able to enjoy it...！
Kuchu... mmm... haa... Ayame-chan's armpit feels great...
Ah... mmm... it's ticklish...！ Ahh, ahh...！
I wonder if you're feeling it because your dick is rubbing against it...？
Hehe♪ I see…So, I'll make you laugh more under your armpits, Ayame-chan,
Haa…haa…it's putting a strain on my stomach, Senpai…！
So, next time, I'll do it slowly…
Is it okay…if I cum a lot under your armpits…！
I'll clean it up later, so just stay still for a little while longer...
If it's a restless male student...
Now that you mention it, she was being followed by a weird kid recently...
I think she might be near the archery club again today？
If it's a restless male student...
Now that you mention it, she was being followed by a weird kid recently...
I think she might be near the archery club again today？
Lately, I've been walking down the hallway lost in thought.
The hallway outside our classroom feels like home, it's soothing.
Ah, I left something on my desk in the classroom...
I don't really meet third-years that often, though...
Someone said they saw Ayabe-senpai at the entrance.
Speaking of which, have you heard the rumor that Ayabe-senpai got a boyfriend recently？
Apparently, her boyfriend is in class 2-B！
The budget documents for the club are a pain...
I need to take them to the student council room...
You're from the computer club, right？
One of your members was looking for you just now.
I wonder what to do about club activities today...
Maybe I'll slack off in the classroom...
When I'm in class, I end up fiddling with my phone...
The blonde girl from the computer club, her appearance and her club activity don't quite match, right?
When I'm in class, I end up fiddling with my phone...
The Photography Club member can't use the computer properly,
and just went running off to the Photography Club room making a big fuss.
After school, I'm looking forward to the entrance hall～
That reminds me, I saw Suzumoto-san heading to class 2-B with a gloomy face,
